features.title: Lander SEO comparison pages
features.description: Publish MdWrk comparison pages against Obsidian, Typora, VS Code, MarkText, Zettlr, Notion, Logseq, and standard Markdown editors while preserving the no-Typora-recommendation policy.

features.title: MdWrk brand and entity normalization
features.description: Align MdWrk naming, metadata, schema, docs, package descriptions, GitHub-facing copy, and footer copy around the MdWrk product entity.

features.title: Appended AEO answer blocks
features.description: Render answer blocks as appended article support content so AEO sections do not dominate the document opening or interrupt the article body.

features.title: AI and search structured data JSON-LD
features.description: Emit accurate JSON-LD for public lander pages where structured data helps crawlers understand page identity, relationships, and article or documentation content.

features.title: Crawlable text and semantic index projection
features.description: Keep important documentation and blog content available as crawlable plain text while generating semantic index projections for internal discovery and AI retrieval aids.

features.title: Docs answer section standardization
features.description: Standardize documentation pages with appended What this does, When to use it, How it works, Example, Common errors, and Related APIs support sections where relevant.

features.title: Blog article guide standardization
features.description: Standardize blog posts with appended article guide sections that improve semantic retrieval without replacing the editorial article body.

features.title: Professional article related-link copy
features.description: Use specific, professional related Docs and article link text across standardized documentation and blog content.

features.title: Article crawlability and internal links
features.description: Enhance docs and blog articles doc-by-doc with crawlable textual content, descriptive headings, internal links, and metadata aligned to MdWrk product surfaces.

features.title: Article metadata schema validation
features.description: Validate MdWrk documentation and blog frontmatter against a shared JSON Schema that requires titles, publication state, dates, and excerpts, with CI coverage for article metadata changes.

features.title: Favicon logo metadata fallback
features.description: Use the MdWrk favicon logo as the default Open Graph, Twitter, and JSON-LD metadata image when an article does not provide a featured image.

features.title: Article excerpt embedded metadata descriptions
features.description: Use authored article excerpts for article cards, page metadata descriptions, BlogPosting JSON-LD descriptions, and embedded metadata link descriptions.

features.title: Article metadata schema CI gate
features.description: Run a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow that validates MdWrk docs and blog frontmatter against the shared article metadata JSON Schema on relevant article, schema, and workflow changes.

features.title: Static lander content compiler

features.title: Static lander artifact verification
features.description: Verify generated MdWrk lander dist artifacts for SEO, AEO, AiEO, static readability, content registry integrity, sitemap and LLM index coverage, JSON-LD, and internal link integrity before deployment.

features.title: Static page frontmatter schema
features.description: Require MdWrk static lander pages to declare mdwrk.page.v1 YAML frontmatter that conforms to the page JSON Schema before content enters the normalized registry.

features.title: Edit-in-renderer profile contract
features.description: Govern the all-in-one edit-in-renderer profile where plaintext Markdown is canonical, rendered Markdown is an isolated projection, and CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk profiles all support editing and previewing in one pane.

features.title: Portable lander package family

features.title: Lander SEO canonical URL metadata

claims.title: Extension continuous experience claim
claims.description: Extension continuous experience features expose intent, capability and trust posture, recovery actions, production trust defaults, and task-first Markdown workflows.

claims.title: Edit-in-renderer profile preserves plaintext source and rendered projection
claims.description: The edit-in-renderer profile requires plaintext Markdown to remain canonical while rendered Markdown is a projection. Editing, previewing, blank content, repeated Enter, cursor location, and profile-specific rendering behavior must preserve plaintext integrity across CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk profiles.

claims.title: Portable lander package family is product agnostic
claims.description: The lander package family exposes generic contracts, compiler, schema, SEO, theme, Markdown-with-YAML-frontmatter, and React surfaces without hardcoded MdWrk product facts.

claims.title: MdWrk lander content pack owns product truth
claims.description: MdWrk-specific pages, product claims, comparison facts, package descriptions, proof pages, and CTAs live in the MdWrk app content pack while generic packages own shape.

claims.title: CFM custom parser profile remains blocked
claims.description: The CFM custom parser profile is included in the frozen certifiability boundary but remains absent and blocked pending implementation and evidence.

claims.title: CFM custom previewer profiles remain blocked
claims.description: The CFM custom previewer profiles are included in the frozen certifiability boundary but remain absent and blocked pending implementation and evidence.

claims.title: Public lander international SEO is statically discoverable
claims.description: Localized public lander pages use crawlable locale URLs, same-locale canonicals, hreflang alternates, sitemap alternates, visible locale switcher links, and no automatic locale redirects.

evidence.title: Static lander content CI local verification
Status bar footer contract local run
Structured data package smoke test evidence

issues.title: Lander code blocks do not render syntax-colored tokens
issues.description: MdWrk.com light and dark themes define syntax color variables and Prism/HLJS token selectors in apps/mdwrkcom/styles/markdown-renderer.css, but @mdwrk/markdown-renderer-core renders fenced code as escaped plain text inside pre/code with only a language-* class. @mdwrk/markdown-renderer-react accepts syntaxTheme but currently ignores it, so no tokenizer emits .token.* or .hljs-* spans. The uniform code color rule then makes docs and blog code blocks render monochrome even when a language is present.

issues.title: Edit-in-renderer cannot delete to blank document
issues.description: Deleting all plaintext markdown in the edit-in-renderer package must be allowed. Empty plaintext is a valid blank Markdown document and must render to an empty projection; placeholder text must never become source or rendered document content.

issues.title: Edit-in-renderer repeated Enter breaks blank-line editing
issues.description: Double-Enter and triple-Enter edits in the edit-in-renderer package must preserve plaintext newline runs, caret offset, and a corresponding rendered blank-line area. The rendered projection must be derived from plaintext and must not collapse trailing blank source lines in a way that breaks editing.

adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Features are the targetable units
Issues are plannable work items
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Normalized prefixed IDs
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Immutable boundary and release snapshots
Fail-closed guards
Generated projections are non-canonical
Explicit schema versioning
Portable SSOT core with repo-specific evidence adapters
Enforce max path and filename lengths under `.ssot`
Profiles are reusable feature bundles with derived pass status

Added locale-aware static output, hreflang, sitemap alternate, and international SEO validation responsibilities.
Created dedicated JSON-LD supported schema type contract.
Expanded supported schema types into a page-scoped JSON-LD graph contract.
Added social and DCMI metadata parity to page-scoped JSON-LD graph validation.

profiles.title: Editor Authoring Default Profile
profiles.description: Default governed capability profile for Markdown editor authoring, link behavior, preview navigation, and view toolbar surfaces.

profiles.title: CommonMark Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring CommonMark Markdown content to support both editing and previewing surfaces, with CommonMark source behavior governed by renderer, editor, and profile contracts.

profiles.title: GFM Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring GitHub Flavored Markdown content to support both editing and previewing surfaces, layered above CommonMark profile behavior.

profiles.title: MdWrk Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring MdWrk Markdown behavior to support both editing and previewing surfaces, including custom profile parsing and previewing layered above CommonMark and GFM.

profiles.title: Edit In Renderer All In One Profile
profiles.description: All-in-one edit-in-renderer profile used to declare the specs, contracts, and expected behavior for unified Markdown editing and previewing. Plaintext Markdown is the canonical source, rendered Markdown is derived projection, and CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk editing/previewing profiles are included.
